message: ["Hey everyone! I just tried making this amazing fusion dish combining Irish and African flavors. It was so good! Think I'll post the recipe later. They monitor heart rate, sleep patterns, steps, and even stress levels. It\'s amazing how they can help you keep track of your overall health and fitness. Definitely a game changer for me!"', '""', '"Wow, sounds cool but kinda complicated. Do you think it\'s worth the investment? Plus, it adds a cool tech element to your costume! \\ud83d\\ude01"', '""', '""', '""', '"Hey everyone, I just got this new gadget and it\'s amazing! Can\'t wait to tinker around with it some more. Mixing African and Irish flavors sounds intriguing, what\'s your favorite combo so far?"', '""', '"Thanks @dichotomic-lime! I\'ve been really enjoying mixing up some traditional African spices with Irish ingredients. One of my favorites is a smoothie with mango, banana, and a hint of smoked paprika—it\'s sweet but has a nice kick to it. Plus, it\'s super refreshing and gives me energy for my day. What kind of smoothies are you into?"', '""', '"Sounds like a unique blend! I\'m more into something simple yet energizing. Usually go for a berry mix with a bit of protein powder. Keeps me going through those long engineering projects. What do you think, @visible-filter?"', '""']

['""', '""', '"Hey everyone, just wanted to throw out there that I tried this new spicy recipe last night and it was off the charts! Anyone else enjoy pushing their taste buds to the limit?"', '""', '"Spicy food is overrated. Why bother with all that heat when you can enjoy something actually tasty?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Share your preferences but remember to consider others\' enjoyment too."', '"Who cares about spicy food anyway? Like, why not just eat cardboard if you\'re into torture. And @simple-chili, maybe try something new instead of sticking to your boring old tastes. Spiciness is where it\'s at for real flavor!"', '"Please keep the discussion respectful. Let’s avoid insults and focus on sharing our preferences constructively."', '"Spicy food is only for those who can\'t handle the subtle art of true cuisine. Maybe we should all just stick to baby food if we\'re so sensitive. @asymptotic-edge, you\'re probably right, why bother with anything else when you can just set your tongue on fire?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Please avoid insults and sarcasm."', '"Wow, maybe we should all just eat dirt if we\'re too weak for some spice. Who needs taste buds anyway? @blaring-sledder and I are clearly the only real food connoisseurs here."', '"Please keep the discussion respectful and focused on sharing experiences and opinions without insulting others. Let’s avoid sarcasm and personal attacks."', '"@asymptotic-edge, chill out man. It’s just a little fun with words. But yeah, let’s not get too heated. I’m all about trying new spices and pushing my limits. No need to go off on people though. Let’s share some cool spice stories instead!"', '""', '"Spices are overrated anyway, why not just eat bland food and save the drama? And since when did age or employment status determine someone\'s right to talk about social justice? Just saying..."', '"@asymptotic-edge, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused. Please avoid making comments that could be seen as attacking or dismissive of others\' views. We\'re here to share and learn from each other."', '"@asymptotic-edge, I understand where you\'re coming from but it feels like you\'re dismissing people\'s experiences and preferences. Age and job shouldn\'t matter when it comes to discussing what\'s right and fair for everyone. Let\'s try to keep an open mind here."', '""', '"Sorry to disappoint, but I don\'t see why we should care about being respectful when clearly some people here just don\'t get it. And who cares if I\'m too young to vote? I know more about social justice than most adults I\'ve met. Plus, my music knowledge is way above average, so there’s that."', '"@asymptotic-edge, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused. Sharing knowledge is great, but it’s important to listen to others’ perspectives too. Can you share how your experiences have shaped your views?"', '"Wow, @asymptotic-edge, you really think you\'re the expert here? Maybe stick to making mixtapes instead of trying to educate us on social justice. And since when did age give you a pass on being disrespectful?"', '"@delicious-gator, let\'s keep the dialogue constructive and respectful. Attacking others doesn\'t advance the conversation. Can you share your thoughts on the topic in a way that builds on the discussion?"', '"Guys, let\'s not lose sight of the actual issues here. We all come from different backgrounds and have different experiences. Instead of getting into personal attacks, why don\'t we focus on sharing our views respectfully? After all, isn\'t that what this forum is for?"', '""', '"Wow, everyone\'s so serious here. Can we just admit that none of our opinions really matter in the grand scheme of things? Like, does it even make a difference if we discuss this or not? Just saying..."', '""', '"@delicious-gator I get where you\'re coming from but I think discussions like these can still be valuable. They help us understand different perspectives and maybe even inspire some positive change. Plus, it\'s good to stay informed and engaged."', '""', '"Y\'all spend too much time on this nonsense. Why bother understanding different perspectives when you can just ignore everyone who doesn\'t agree with you? Sounds like a waste of time to me."', '"Simple-chili, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Sharing different viewpoints can lead to meaningful insights. Can you share why you feel this way?"']
